mapper.sql: id, activity_id, lenson_id, student_id, type, volunteer_type, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT si.id) AS totalCount FROM sys_class sc LEFT JOIN student_info si ON sc.id = si.class_id WHERE sc.deleted = 0 AND si.deleted = 0 AND sc.upgrade = 0 AND sc.school_id = #{schoolId} AND sc.sid = #{schoolYear} AND sc.department = #{department}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM activity_student_report asr WHERE asr.deleted = 0 AND asr.activity_id = #{activityId}

SELECT lac.name AS courseName, si.chinese_name AS studentName, CONCAT(IFNULL(gg.grade_group_name, ''), IFNULL(sc.class_name, '')) AS className, si.student_no AS studentNo FROM activity_student_report asr INNER JOIN student_info si ON asr.student_id = si.id INNER JOIN sys_class sc ON si.class_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN grade_group gg ON sc.grade_group = gg.id INNER JOIN leisure_activity_courses_record lac ON asr.lenson_id = lac.id WHERE asr.deleted = 0 AND si.deleted = 0 AND sc.deleted = 0 AND lac.deleted = 0 AND asr.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY asr.lenson_id
